videos.title: Johannes Høsflot Klæbo Training 2025
videos.description:
► Get technique analysis of your skiing: https://linktr.ee/muhleggchannel

► Do you have any Questions? Reach me on mye Socials!
• Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/johannmuhleggchannel/
• TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@johannmuhleggyt  
• E-mail: muhleggchannel@yahoo.com

► Music used in the video:
Darude - Sandstorm

► Description
Johannes Høsflot Klæbo (born 22 October 1996) is a Norwegian cross-country skier who represents Byåsen IL.[3] He holds multiple records, most notably for being the youngest male in history to win the FIS Cross-Country World Cup, the Tour de Ski, a World Championship event, and an Olympic event in cross-country skiing.[4][5][6][7]

During the 2019–2020 World Cup season, Klæbo became the most successful male sprinter in World Cup history in terms of individual race victories and set a new record for the most overall sprint titles, with 4.[8] He is currently the most successful male overall race winner in the competition's history.[9][10]

Klæbo won three gold medals at the 2018 Winter Olympics, in his debut Olympic appearance.[11][12]

#johannmühlegg #crosscountryskiing

videos.title: The Cross Country Skiing Paradise Of Norway
videos.description:
Cross country skiing, Norway’s national sport, and where better place to nordic ski than arguably Norway’s best cross country skiing location: Sjusjøen. 

Also known as Nordic skiing, sometimes ski touring, or simply XC skiing, this sport is growing increasingly popular thanks to the combination of exercise, technique, and often stunning scenery. 

360km of trails makes Sjusjøen a top Nordic skiing destination, with people travelling from all over Norway, and even the world, to ski here. Are the boys becoming the new johannes klæbo? Will they maybe Even meet Øystein Pettersen? 

Sjusjøen is the location for several cross country skiing races throughout the ski season, including the famous Birkebeinerrennet which runs through Sjusjøen.  


Cross country skiing, or langrennsski as it’s known in Norwegian, actually has two quite distinct styles, classic and skating (klassisk and skøyte in Norwegian respectively). The equipment, and more importantly technique, are quite different in each. Most XC skiing beginners start with classic, and then move onto skating which is usually considered more challenging. 

Many professionals come to Sjusjøen to train, including Petter Northug, Johannes Klæbo, Marit Bjørgen, Øystein Pettersen, many of whom have won Olympic medals and represent the best of the best at the sport. And not to forget Therese Johaug. 

Nordic skiing can be a serious workout and many consider skiers to have some of the highest VO2 max levels of any support. However, it’s also a popular activity with recreational skiers who simply enjoy heading out for a leisurely trip.

Should we make a episode with Therese Johaug? 

For you collaborations please do contact us on Thomas@becomenorwegian.com


#crosscountryskiing #xcskiing #crosscountryski

videos.title: Føre-og smøremelding til Marka Rundt med Johan Kjølstad
videos.description:
Velkommen til Marka Rundt 2013

Anbefaling FESTE:
-sandpapir i festesonen
-tynt lag med basevoks smeltes inn
-SKIGO HF Rød
- evt SKIGO HF gul i tråkket.

Har du rubbeski? Ta det med; det kan godt hende at dette blir bra i morgen!

Anbefaling GLI:
I bunn anbefaler vi alltid å smelte inn og sikle/børste SKIGO LF Grafitt.
(hvorfor legge grafitt; se her: http://tinyurl.com/LFgrafitt
Så legger man SKIGO LF (lavfluor) Orange glider eller SKIGO HF (høyfluor) Orange glider.
(hvordan legge på glider: http://tinyurl.com/legge-glider og hvordan fjerne glideren og polere med børster http://tinyurl.com/fjerne-glider)

SUPERGLI:
For de som skal gli fra alle de andre og ønsker å legge topping over glideren anbefaler vi SKIGO C22 Fluorpulver. 

LYKKE TIL!
